description: Search FDA drug recall enforcement records — keyless, offline-cacheable, agent-native. Reports FDA facts only; never says a drug is safe.

tools.name: enforcement_list
tools.description: Search drug recall enforcement records with an openFDA Lucene search expression. Optional: search, limit (default: 25), skip (default: 0) (plus 2 more).

params.name: search
params.description: openFDA search expression, e.g. product_description:'ibuprofen' or classification:'Class I'

params.name: skip
params.description: Number of records to skip (pagination offset)

params.name: count
params.description: Field to aggregate counts by, e.g. classification.exact or recalling_firm.exact
